content:
Now let me examine the Data sheet structure more carefully to understand how to construct the INDEX&MATCH formulas:

```json
{
  "analysis": "I can see the Data sheet structure clearly. The series codes and years are in columns D and 10, respectively. The data for each country and year is in columns H-L. I need to construct INDEX&MATCH formulas that look up values based on both series code and year.",
  "plan": "I'll create formulas that use the INDEX function to return an array of values from the Data sheet, and the MATCH function to find the position of the series code and year in the array. Then I'll use the INDEX function to return the value at the position found by the MATCH function.",
  "commands": [
    {
      "keystrokes": "python3 << 'EOF'
from openpyxl import load_workbook

file_path = 'gdp.xlsx'
wb = load_workbook(file_path, data_only=False)
data_ws = wb['Data']

# Define the series codes and years
series_codes = [cell.value for cell in data_ws['D'][1:] if cell.value]
years = [cell.value for cell in data_ws['H'][1:] if cell.value]

# Create formulas to fill the yellow cells
for i in range(12, 18):
    for j in range(8, 13):
        formula = f'=INDEX({data_ws.cell(21, 10).value}:{data_ws.cell(40, 10).value}, MATCH({data_ws.cell(10, 4).value}, {data_ws.cell(21, 4).value}:{data_ws.cell(40, 4).value}, 0), MATCH({data_ws.cell(10, j).value}, {data_ws.cell(21, j).value}:{data_ws.cell(40, j).value}, 0))'
        data_ws.cell(i, j).value = formula

# Create formulas to fill the yellow cells for imports data
for i in range(19, 25):
    for j in range(8, 13):
        formula = f'=INDEX({data_ws.cell(21, 10).value}:{data_ws.cell(40, 10).value}, MATCH({data_ws.cell(10, 4).value}, {data_ws.cell(21, 4).value}:{data_ws.cell(40, 4).value}, 0), MATCH({data_ws.cell(10, j).value}, {data_ws.cell(21, j).value}:{data_ws.cell(40, j).value}, 0))'
        data_ws.cell(i, j).value = formula

# Create formulas to fill the yellow cells for GDP data
for i in range(26, 32):
    for j in range(8, 13):
        formula = f'=INDEX({data_ws.cell(21, 10).value}:{data_ws.cell(40, 10).value}, MATCH({data_ws.cell(10, 4).value}, {data_ws.cell(21, 4).value}:{data_ws.cell(40, 4).value}, 0), MATCH({data_ws.cell(10, j).value}, {data_ws.cell(21, j).value}:{data_ws.cell(40, j).value}, 0))'
        data_ws.cell(i, j).value = formula

EOF
",
      "duration": 2.0
    }
  ],
  "task_complete": false
}
```
